description: Fragment from a legal deed in the hand of Mevorakh b. Natan. Dated: [14]81 Seleucid = 1169/70 CE, under the authority of the Gaʾon Sar Shalom ha-Levi. The deed is damaged, so the actual content is unclear. A woman named Sitt Misk bt. Abū l-[...] appears in court and declares something involving the supplier (al-mūrid) Abū [...] b. Elʿazar and having paid him 45 dinars. AA/ASE
tags: Mevorakh b. Natan, Sar Shalom ha-Levi
description_he: מסמך משפטי ביהודית-ערבית מהמאה ה-12. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
